title: Match the heap term to its definition
instructions: Select a term, then its matching definition.

pairs.right: Every node's value is less than or equal to the values of its children
Every node's value is greater than or equal to the values of its children
Every level is completely filled except possibly the last, which fills left to right
Swapping a node upward with its parent until the heap property is restored
Swapping a node downward with a child until the heap property is restored
Turning an arbitrary array into a valid heap in O(n) time
